name: PowerSchool Student Information System API
what_it_does: PowerSchool REST API for K-12 student information system (SIS). Enables AI agents to manage student enrollment, attendance, grades, course information, parent/guardian contact data, and scheduling. Integrates with school district data systems to power educational data workflows, rostering, and analytics for districts and ed-tech applications.
use_cases: Syncing student roster and enrollment data from ed-tech integration agents
Querying attendance and grade data from district analytics agents
Managing course scheduling from academic planning agents
Integrating student data with LMS and assessment platforms from district integration agents
not_for: Higher education without K-12 SIS requirements
Non-district education providers without PowerSchool deployments
General HR management without student data focus
best_when: A K-12 school district using PowerSchool wants AI agents or ed-tech platforms to integrate student roster, attendance, and grade data through PowerSchool's data access layer.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Student educational records are protected by FERPA (US). Data on minors requires parental consent and strict data governance. Agents handling student data must be FERPA-compliant.

auth.notes: PowerSchool uses OAuth 2.0 with authorization code for application access. Ed-tech applications register via PowerSchool Application Marketplace. Per-district authorization required — each district must approve the app.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — district licensing for PowerSchool SIS
pricing.paid_tiers: District enterprise licensing per-student; API access via developer marketplace
pricing.notes: Largest K-12 ed-tech company (Vista Equity Partners owned). Per-district deployment. App Marketplace for ed-tech integration partners. Developer sandbox available.

performance.rate_limits: Per-district API limits; rate limits per application

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Student educational records protected by FERPA — strict legal requirements for data handling
COPPA: Data on children under 13 — parental consent and additional restrictions
No public MCP server — enterprise-only REST API via App Marketplace
Per-district authorization: each school district must approve your app separately
US-only — FERPA is US law; international deployments have different frameworks
App Marketplace review process required — plan for approval timeline before launch
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Student FERPA-protected educational records and COPPA-regulated child data. SOC2. US-only. Per-district OAuth authorization. Strict data governance required.

security_score_components.security_notes: FERPA student records and COPPA child data. SOC2. US-only. Per-district OAuth. Strict data governance and consent required.
